name: new-shell
description: Scaffold a runnable single-spa SHELL for your devedge uFEs with `de ufe shell`: it reads the kind:Shell roster `de ufe new` writes and generates a host with a left side-nav menu (one item per uFE, active-route highlight, signed-in user) that renders each uFE in its content area — so you SEE your uFE render without copying an example shell. `--preset-dir` is an extension point for overlaying a session provider, design system, and branded/grouped nav. Pairs with new-ufe.
